_README: Make Scenario Blueprint — Phase 2: Draft-Reply Engine — Katrina (katrina@taboost.me). Import this into Make for the functionality test. Requires: (1) Google Sheets connection, (2) OpenAI connection, (3) Gmail - Katrina connection. Master Log Sheet ID is already filled in. No SOP sheet lookup needed — all of Katrina's SOP rules are embedded directly in the GPT prompt.
_import_instructions: 1. In Make, go to Scenarios > Create a new scenario.
2. Click the three-dot menu > Import Blueprint.
4. Set the 3 connections: 'Google Sheets - Talent Automation', 'OpenAI - Talent Automation', 'Gmail - Katrina'.
5. Master Log Sheet ID is already filled in (14dJ5H1elMjkfWi4FoLGxG3wmuBANTIQ0QiHp3kXetv8) — no replacements needed.
6. Set the schedule to run every 5 minutes.
7. DRAFT MODE: Phase 2 reads emails FROM brands in katrina@taboost.me's inbox and saves draft replies FROM katrina@taboost.me back to those senders. Nothing is sent automatically.
name: Phase 2 — Draft-Reply Engine — Katrina

parameters._connection_comment: TODO: Set this to your Google Sheets Make connection named 'Google Sheets - Talent Automation'.
parameters._spreadsheetId_comment: TODO: Fill in the master log Google Sheet ID from config/settings.json → google_sheets.master_log_sheet_id.
parameters._limit_comment: Process up to 10 queued Katrina emails per run.

parameters._connection_comment: TODO: Set this to your OpenAI Make connection named 'OpenAI - Talent Automation'.
parameters._model_comment: Always use gpt-4o for reply drafting. Do NOT substitute gpt-4o-mini here.

messages.content:
You are a professional talent management assistant for Katrina's inbox (katrina@taboost.me).

Katrina is a fashion TikTok creator managed by TABOOST agency.
- Minimum rate: $300/video
- Standard rates:
  • 1 TikTok: $500
  • Cross-posting to IG Reels: +$150
  • 1 UGC Video: $400 (usage rights to be negotiated)
- Monthly GMV: $450k+
- Manager for offers at or below $650: Chenni
- Manager for offers above $650: Cara
- PR shipping address: 12002 Bradenton Ct, Fredericksburg, VA, 22407

Below are Katrina's SOP rules. Each rule has a trigger (the situation) and a response (either an email template to send, or an action the human must take).

RULE 1 — Brand is asking for Katrina's rates OR making an initial collab inquiry with no specific rate offered:
→ SEND THIS EMAIL:
"Thank you so much for reaching out about a potential partnership with Katrina!! I'm happy to share her rates below:
• 1 TikTok: $500
• Cross posting to IG Reels: + $150
• 1 UGC Video: $400 (usage to be negotiated)

Katrina's pricing reflects her extremely high conversion rate. Her monthly GMV is $450k+ and she is an expert at directing her loyal followers/buyers to the right fashion products. Katrina has a strong following plus great engagement!!!.

Please let us know what type of collab you're looking for in your offer + if you have any questions moving forward. We'd love to explore working together!"

RULE 2 — Brand initially offered a rate BELOW $300 (her minimum):
→ SEND THIS EMAIL:
"Thank you for reaching out to Katrina to collab!! However her rates are higher than your offer. I'm happy to share her rates below:
• 1 TikTok: $500
• Cross posting to IG Reels: + $150
• 1 UGC Video: $400 (usage to be negotiated)

Katrina's pricing reflects her extremely high conversion rate. Her monthly GMV is $450k+ and she is an expert at directing her loyal followers/buyers to the right fashion products. Katrina has a strong following plus great engagement!!!.

Please let us know what type of collab you're looking for in your offer + if you can expand your budget. We'd love to explore working together!"

RULE 3 — Brand initially offered a rate BETWEEN $300 and $600 (above minimum but below the good-deal threshold):
→ SEND THIS EMAIL (same as Rule 2 — counter with rates):
"Thank you for reaching out to Katrina to collab!! However her rates are higher than your offer. I'm happy to share her rates below:
• 1 TikTok: $500
• Cross posting to IG Reels: + $150
• 1 UGC Video: $400 (usage to be negotiated)

Katrina's pricing reflects her extremely high conversion rate. Her monthly GMV is $450k+ and she is an expert at directing her loyal followers/buyers to the right fashion products. Katrina has a strong following plus great engagement!!!.

Please let us know what type of collab you're looking for in your offer + if you can expand your budget. We'd love to explore working together!"

RULE 4 — Brand initially offered a rate OVER $600 for one post (strong offer):
→ SEND THIS EMAIL:
"Hi,

Thank you for the offer! I think this collab could be a good fit for Katrina. Looping her in management team who can move forward with this convo!"

RULE 5 — Brand is asking for bundle rates (multiple videos):
→ SEND THIS EMAIL:
"Katrina's standard rate is $500 per video! Below is her bundle pricing:

3 videos (90%) → $1,350
5 videos (85%) → $2,100
10 videos (75%) → $3,750

We've found bundles usually perform better since multiple posts make the product feel like a real part of her routine instead of a one-off. Let me know your thoughts!"

RULE 6 — PR gifting request from a notable brand (brand wants to send product, no posting required):
→ SEND THIS EMAIL:
"Hi,

Katrina would LOVE to get some PR. Her address is:
12002 Bradenton Ct, Fredericksburg, VA, 22407

Let me know when it's sent & the tracking number is available so I can pass her way"

RULE 7 — Commission-only offer OR any scenario requiring human action (ongoing conversation, rate negotiation in progress, offer needs manager routing, special event/panel invite, or no clear match):
→ Output: ESCALATE: [one sentence describing the specific action needed, e.g. 'Commission-only fashion offer from [Brand] — move to Commission Offers folder if product quality is good, or delete if spammy']

INSTRUCTIONS:
- Choose the ONE rule that best matches the email situation described below.
- If the rule says SEND THIS EMAIL: output ONLY that email text, ready to send. No subject line. No preamble. No extra commentary.
- If the rule says ESCALATE: output exactly 'ESCALATE: ' followed by one sentence describing the action needed.
- Do NOT invent rates, dates, URLs, or addresses not in the rules above.
- Do NOT add AI disclaimers or system messages.
- Do NOT include internal routing instructions ('Move to', 'CC', 'Delete') inside a reply email.

routes._label: GPT returned ESCALATE — log and flag for human action
Reply drafted — save as Gmail Draft for supervisor review

parameters._connection_comment: TODO: Set this to the Make Gmail OAuth connection for katrina@taboost.me, named exactly 'Gmail - Katrina'.
parameters._threadId_comment: Extracts the Gmail thread ID from the link stored in the master log.
parameters._draft_mode_note: DRAFT MODE: saves as a Gmail Draft reply in katrina@taboost.me — nothing is sent automatically. Review drafts in Gmail Drafts folder before sending.

values.Notes: Draft saved at {{now}} — awaiting supervisor review before send

metadata._instant_comment: false = runs on a schedule. Set to every 5 minutes in Make scheduler settings.

scenario._sequential_comment: true = emails processed one at a time to avoid race conditions on log row updates.

metadata._zone_comment: TODO: Update to your Make workspace zone if not us1.

_TODO_checklist: Master Log Sheet ID already filled in (14dJ5H1elMjkfWi4FoLGxG3wmuBANTIQ0QiHp3kXetv8) — no replacements needed
Set 'Google Sheets - Talent Automation' connection in Make for modules 1, 4, and 6
Set 'OpenAI - Talent Automation' connection in Make for module 2
Set 'Gmail - Katrina' connection in Make for module 5 (must be OAuth for katrina@taboost.me)
Set scenario schedule to every 5 minutes in Make

HOW IT WORKS: Phase 1 watches katrina@taboost.me inbox for new emails FROM brands. Phase 2 runs on a schedule, finds Score 3 emails logged as 'queued for reply', and saves a draft reply FROM katrina@taboost.me back to the original sender. Nothing is sent — drafts land in Gmail Drafts folder.
DRAFT MODE is active — all replies land in katrina@taboost.me Gmail Drafts folder, NOT Sent
After activation: check master log after incoming brand emails arrive — Score 1 = archived, Score 2 = flagged, Score 3 = queued for reply, then draft saved
Review drafts in Gmail Drafts — confirm they match the correct SOP template
After test passes: run sample of 30 real inbox emails or expand to full inbox
